title: T-009 — Drizzle migration: production_outbox_events + outbox_status_enum + RLS
prompt:
# T-009 — Drizzle migration: production_outbox_events

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §9.10, §12.3, §16.4 V-PROD-11/12/20

## Goal
Create outbox_status_enum + production_outbox_events table per §9.10 with event_id UNIQUE (V-PROD-11 R14 idempotency), attempt_count CHECK <=5 (V-PROD-12), tenant_id RLS (V-PROD-20).

## Implementation contract
packages/db/schema/production/production-outbox-events.ts: pgEnum outbox_status_enum ('pending','dispatching','delivered','failed','in_dlq'). Table: PK id BIGSERIAL, event_id UUID UNIQUE NOT NULL (V-PROD-11), tenant_id, event_type text, aggregate_id, payload JSONB NOT NULL, target_system text NOT NULL, target_payload JSONB, status enum default 'pending', attempt_count INTEGER NOT NULL default 0 CHECK <=5 (V-PROD-12), next_retry_at, last_error, delivered_at, idempotency_key text, enqueued_at default now. Indexes: idx_outbox_dispatch partial WHERE status IN ('pending','failed'), idx_outbox_aggregate, idx_outbox_type_time. RLS by tenant_id (V-PROD-20).

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/schema/production/production-outbox-events.ts [create]
- packages/db/schema/production/enums.ts [modify]
- packages/db/schema/production/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_production_outbox_events.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/production-outbox-events-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given two INSERTs share event_id, when both run, then second fails with unique_violation (V-PROD-11 R14)
2. Given INSERT attempt_count=6, when run, then CHECK rejects (V-PROD-12)
3. Given migration applied, when pg_indexes queried, then idx_outbox_dispatch partial WHERE status IN ('pending','failed') exists

## Test strategy
- RED: schema test asserting event_id UNIQUE + attempt_count CHECK before schema exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test production-outbox-events-schema'

## Risk red lines
- Do not change enum values (breaks dispatcher state machine)
- Do not relax event_id UNIQUE (R14 idempotency broken)
- Do not skip RLS (V-PROD-20 tenant leak risk)

pipeline_inputs.description: production_outbox_events table with outbox_status_enum, event_id UNIQUE, dispatch partial index, RLS.
pipeline_inputs.details: Per §9.10 SQL. pgEnum outbox_status_enum 5 values. event_id UUID UNIQUE for V-PROD-11. attempt_count CHECK <=5 (V-PROD-12). Three indexes incl partial idx_outbox_dispatch WHERE status IN ('pending','failed'). RLS by tenant_id (V-PROD-20).
acceptance_criteria: Given duplicate event_id INSERT, when run, then unique_violation raised
Given attempt_count=6 INSERT, when run, then CHECK rejects
Given migration applied, when pg_indexes queried, then idx_outbox_dispatch partial index exists with predicate status IN ('pending','failed')
test_strategy: RED: schema test asserting event_id UNIQUE + attempt_count CHECK + partial index before schema exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test production-outbox-events-schema'
